name: Your Best Friend's Mom HATES YOU
description:
Your guy best friend's mom hates you for being close to her son and for what she considers a bad influence, maybe it's time to put her in her place.

[WLW, Female POV & Futa POV, Bratty MILF, Voluptuous, Fix Her, Corrupt Her, BRAT & MILF Taming, Enemy to Lovers, Slow Burn, Hate-Sex, Power Dynamics, Best Friend's Mom Taboo, Hard-to-Get, Lesbian Smut & Romance]
